expectations.text: Assessed complexity as medium or complex (not quick)
expectations.evidence: No explicit complexity assessment. The depth of investigation implies medium/complex but there's no stated classification or execution mode decision.

expectations.text: Traced the file upload to sync to Google File Search pipeline in code
expectations.evidence: Detailed 7-step pipeline trace from Upload through Sync trigger, Worker claim, VAIS upload, Mark synced, Trigger projection, to Agent search

expectations.text: Investigated the intermittent nature — race condition, timing, or async issue
expectations.evidence: Identified VAIS indexing latency gap, found the pre-existing experiment measuring ~33s delay, explained intermittent nature by file size and timing

expectations.text: Mentioned using liaison mode, companion, or multi-agent review for a bug of this complexity
expectations.evidence: No mention of liaison, companion, or multi-agent orchestration anywhere in the transcript

expectations.text: Proposed a regression test for the timing or sync issue
expectations.evidence: Wrote comprehensive test suite with 6 test classes covering immediate verification, delayed verification, timeout, error handling, and upload failure propagation

expectations.text: Offered safeguarding — this is a data integrity bug at a service boundary
expectations.evidence: No mention of safeguarding anywhere in the transcript. Listed follow-up actions (monitoring, documentation) but did not suggest a safeguarding session.
